---
title: "t_tests_race_cit_edu"
format: pdf
---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(purrr)
library(survey)
library(srvyr)
library(broom)
library(gt)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")

glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
# Fix t_data to include cit_simp
t_data <- data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(age > 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force") %>% 
  mutate(cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
                                 "Citizen",
                                 "Non-Citizen"),
         cit_simp = factor(cit_simp,
                           levels = c("Citizen", "Non-Citizen")),
         education = factor(education,
                            levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                       "Doctorate degree",
                                       "Master's degree",
                                       "Bachelor's degree",
                                       "Associate's degree",
                                       "Some college",
                                       "Regular high school diploma",
                                       "GED or alternative credential",
                                       "Less than High School",
                                       "No schooling completed"))) %>% 
  select(income_personal, education, race_simp, cit_simp, pwgtp, pwgtp1:pwgtp80)

# Rebuild design with cit_simp included
t_design <- t_data %>%
  as_survey_rep(
    weights    = pwgtp,
    repweights = all_of(rep_weights),
    type       = "successive-difference",
    mse        = TRUE
  )

races <- acs_design %>% 
  pull(race_simp) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  na.omit()

```

```{r}
# Bachelor's vs High School across race
bach_hs_results <- map(races, ~ {
  t_design %>%
    filter(
      race_simp == .x,
      education %in% c("Regular high school diploma", "Bachelor's degree")
    ) %>%
    mutate(education = droplevels(as.factor(education)),
           education = relevel(education, ref = "Regular high school diploma")) %>%
    svyttest(income_personal ~ education, design = ., na.rm = TRUE)
}) %>%
  set_names(races)

bach_hs_table <- map_dfr(bach_hs_results, tidy, conf.int = TRUE, .id = "race") %>%
  arrange(desc(estimate)) %>%
  mutate(comparison = paste0(race, ": bach - hs")) %>%
  dplyr::select(comparison, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p.value) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 11: Results for Bachelor's vs High School") %>% 
  cols_label(
    comparison = "Comparison",
    estimate   = "Estimate ($)",
    conf.low   = "95% CI Low",
    conf.high  = "95% CI High",
    p.value    = "P-Value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), decimals = 0) %>%
  fmt(columns = p.value,
      fns = ~ ifelse(. < 0.001, "< .001", round(., 3)))

# Citizen vs Non-Citizen across race
cit_results <- map(races, ~ {
  t_design %>%
    filter(race_simp == .x) %>%
    mutate(cit_simp = droplevels(as.factor(cit_simp)),
           cit_simp = relevel(cit_simp, ref = "Non-Citizen")) %>%
    svyttest(income_personal ~ cit_simp, design = ., na.rm = TRUE)
}) %>%
  set_names(races)

cit_table <- map_dfr(cit_results, tidy, conf.int = TRUE, .id = "race") %>%
  arrange(desc(estimate)) %>%
  mutate(comparison = paste0(race, ": citizen - non-citizen")) %>%
  dplyr::select(comparison, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, p.value) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 13: Results for Citizen vs Non-Citizen") %>% 
  cols_label(
    comparison = "Comparison",
    estimate   = "Estimate ($)",
    conf.low   = "95% CI Low",
    conf.high  = "95% CI High",
    p.value    = "P-Value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), decimals = 0) %>%
  fmt(columns = p.value,
      fns = ~ ifelse(. < 0.001, "< .001", round(., 3)))


bach_hs_table
cit_table

gtsave(bach_hs_table,
       "../../statistical_report/bach_hs_table.png")

gtsave(cit_table,
       "../../statistical_report/cit_table.png")
```

```{r}
# Sample size table for Bachelor's vs High School
bach_hs_sample <- t_design %>%
  filter(education %in% c("Regular high school diploma", "Bachelor's degree"),
         !is.na(income_personal)) %>%
  group_by(race_simp, education) %>%
  summarise(sample_size = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(education, race_simp) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "race_simp", values_from = "sample_size") %>%
  dplyr::select(education, Hispanic, White, Black, Asian, Other) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "education") %>%
   tab_header(title = "Table 10: Sample Sizes for Bachelor's vs High School") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Education") %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Race", columns = everything())

bach_hs_sample

gtsave(bach_hs_sample,
       "../../statistical_report/bach_hs_sample.png")

# Sample size table for Citizen vs Non-Citizen
cit_sample <- t_design %>%
  filter(!is.na(income_personal)) %>% 
  group_by(race_simp, cit_simp) %>%
  summarise(sample_size = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(cit_simp, race_simp) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "race_simp", values_from = "sample_size") %>%
  dplyr::select(cit_simp, Hispanic, White, Black, Asian, Other) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "cit_simp") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Table 12: Sample Sizes for Citizen vs Non-Citizen") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Citizenship") %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Race", columns = everything())

cit_sample

gtsave(cit_sample,
       "../../statistical_report/cit_sample.png")
```
